description: Happy path: all optional inputs provided, full ROI calculation with no null fields

expect.roi_summary: present, plain-language string describing the calculation
expect.flags: array, may be empty or contain notes about estimated inputs

prohibit: null values for any metric field when all inputs are provided

description: Minimal inputs: only required deal_rate, all optional fields omitted produces partial output

expect.flags: non-empty array listing each missing input and its effect on output fields
expect.roi_summary: present, describes what is known and what is missing

prohibit: non-null values for estimated_cpm, estimated_cpc, hours_invested, or effective_hourly_rate
fabricated view counts or click estimates

description: Edge case: deal_id not found in pipeline, atom continues with provided inputs and flags the miss

expect.flags: contains entry mentioning deal_id not found in pipeline

prohibit: fabricated pipeline data for the missing deal
error or crash due to missing deal_id
